{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032409560001BFF60AB2CB6D2944D6"}"},"total":2077},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7476787403925275454","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好的一本书，特别有看头，第一次没有跳章节的一点一点看完!故事内容新颖，没有千篇一律的情节。思路清晰，情节跌宕起伏，特别好看!作者加油哦！期待你其他的杰作!"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740828302,"group_id":"7366881285945445400","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwQ+vOA2tSYmUGC5LpRG03c=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875760&x-signature=4yQWCuTLmzIzWmqV0uQuVGZLlYo%3D","user_id":"111185740490","user_name":"梨诺吖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111185740490","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7366881285945445400","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+都市高武＋无女主+杀伐果断+群像+微迪化】
陆长生穿越成为长生堂堂主，绑定徒弟培养系统。
只要培养好徒弟，就能云共享徒弟的修炼成果，而系统币则可以抽取各种【技能】装备在徒弟身上。
本来一切都很美好。
可惜...
【长生殡葬服务】
看着小店门头的招牌，陆长生愈加的烦躁了起来，这个狗系统，给自己安排个什么职业不好，非要整个搞白事的，这叫他怎么收徒弟？
难道挨家挨户上门去问，你家的孩子对白事感不感兴趣？
你家的孩子一看就是百年难得一见的白事奇才，随我一起，为另一个世界的人送去光怀吗？
好不容易。
陆长生才收到了徒弟，可那些徒弟却一个比一个不让他省心......
“你说你的徒弟是人族第一人，斩妖司首席？”
陆长生点了点头。
“你还说，你的徒弟是大名鼎鼎的关家圣人？曾以一人之力横推妖族万里，杀的那群畜生闻关字而后怕？”
陆长生依然点头。
“那你还在这里卖血换钱，吹牛不打草稿！”
陆长生无奈道，“这个故事说起来，话就长了......”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/00fac1812e1736a8f9ce47ede55e4687","author":"大块牛肉面","author_id":"","book_id":"7366881285945445400","book_name":"我开的是殡仪馆，真不会教斩妖啊","book_short_name":"高武：长生堂","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7367251155157844504","read_count":"18406","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1249469"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"563","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,无女主,无后宫,群像,迪化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7b30d3bbc21afb55f0eef8465d9b5011~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779501360&x-signature=%2FXlQbonNWDzXII4qGlQdBBEvAXc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"153537485472988","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_
